---
title: "State Reports" 
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    embed-resources: TRUE
    code-fold: true
    page-layout: full
    fig_caption: yes
---

<br>

[Alabama](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_Alabama)  
[Alaska](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_Alaska)  
[Arizona](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_Arizona)  
[Arkansas](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_Arkansas)  
[California](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_California)  
[Colorado](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_Colorado)  
[Connecticut](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_Connecticut)  
[Delaware](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_Delaware)  
[Florida](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_Florida)  
[Georgia](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_Georgia)  
[Hawaii](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_Hawaii)  
[Idaho](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_Idaho)  
[Illinois](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_Illinois)  
[Indiana](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_Indiana)  
[Iowa](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_Iowa)  
[Kansas](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_Kansas)  
[Kentucky](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_Kentucky)  
[Louisiana](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_Louisiana)  
[Maine](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_Maine)  
[Maryland](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_Maryland)  
[Massachusetts](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_Massachusetts)  
[Michigan](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_Michigan)  
[Minnesota](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_Minnesota)  
[Mississippi](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_Mississippi)  
[Missouri](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_Missouri)  
[Montana](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_Montana)  
[Nebraska](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_Nebraska)  
[Nevada](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_Nevada)  
[New Hampshire](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_New_Hampshire)  
[New Jersey](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_New_Jersey)  
[New Mexico](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_New_Mexico)  
[New York](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_New_York)  
[North Carolina](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_North_Carolina)  
[North Dakota](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_North_Dakota)  
[Ohio](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_Ohio)  
[Oklahoma](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_Oklahoma)  
[Oregon](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_Oregon)  
[Pennsylvania](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_Pennsylvania)  
[Rhode Island](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_Rhode_Island)  
[South Carolina](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_South_Carolina)  
[South Dakota](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_South_Dakota)  
[Tennessee](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_Tennessee)  
[Texas](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_Texas)  
[Utah](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_Utah)  
[Vermont](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_Vermont)  
[Virginia](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_Virginia)  
[Washington](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_Washington)  
[West Virginia](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_West_Virginia)  
[Wisconsin](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_Wisconsin)  
[Wyoming](https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/state_report_Wyoming)
